text:
RepoPulse forecast (7-day breakout watchlist)

Method: reproducible baseline model using public GitHub signals (no LLM).
Breakout = +max(200 stars, +50%) within 7 days.

1) karpathy/autoresearch | 97% | stars now 27164 → est 75513 (range 75421-75605)
   https://github.com/karpathy/autoresearch
2) paperclipai/paperclip | 97% | stars now 19564 → est 38995 (range 38917-39073)
   https://github.com/paperclipai/paperclip
3) HKUDS/CLI-Anything | 97% | stars now 6704 → est 23826 (range 23797-23855)
   https://github.com/HKUDS/CLI-Anything
4) tanweai/pua | 96% | stars now 4232 → est 15371 (range 15346-15396)
   https://github.com/tanweai/pua
5) googleworkspace/cli | 96% | stars now 19243 → est 38638 (range 38530-38746)
   https://github.com/googleworkspace/cli

Daily forecasts are logged publicly, then scored 7 days later (hits, misses, calibration).
#opensource #software #datascience #forecasting #github
